# oci_containerengine_cluster_auth (Data Source)

`oci_containerengine_cluster_auth` is a compatibility alias for [`oketoken_cluster_auth`](./oketoken_cluster_auth.md). It exposes the same schema and returns the same short-lived OKE authentication token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "oke-token" {}

data "oci_containerengine_cluster_auth" "example" {
  cluster_id = "ocid1.cluster.oc1.iad.exampleuniqueID"
}
```

## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) The OCID of the OKE cluster.

### Read-Only

- `expiration` (String) The HTTP date timestamp when the generated token expires.
- `id` (String) The resource identifier, set to the cluster OCID.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The generated base64 URL-safe authentication token.
